skills.name: qavajs
skills.description: Authoritative guide to the qavajs BDD test-automation framework — config, CLI, memory, validation, page-object DSL, composition, parallel/sharding, ~300 literal Gherkin step patterns across 11 @qavajs/steps-* packages, plus agent-driven workflows for creating, running and fixing tests.

skills.name: browser-verify
skills.description: Testing-grade browser automation via Chrome DevTools Protocol — direct DOM, JS-runtime, network, cookies, computed-styles and console access. No external dependencies beyond Node 22's built-in WebSocket. Used by the qavajs agent to ground-truth selectors and triage flake against a live Chrome.

skills.name: playwright-cli
skills.description: Reference for Microsoft's @playwright/cli — a snapshot/ref-based browser automation CLI separate from @playwright/test. Covers open/goto/click/fill/snapshot/eval, named sessions, attach to a paused --debug=cli test, request mocking via route, storage-state save/load, tracing, and video recording. Auto-generates Playwright TS code from interactions.
